channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Balochistan Security Operations Result in 75 Terrorist Killings Since July 5
item.description: Balochistan Chief Minister Sarfraz Bugti announced that 75 terrorists have been eliminated in intelligence-based operations across the province since July 5. The statement was made during a social med...

item.title: Readers Discuss Ocean Conservation, SME Reforms, and Football Integrity
item.description: The article highlights three key topics: ocean conservation, SME reforms, and football integrity. It begins by emphasizing the urgent need to address marine pollution, particularly ghost fishing gear,...

item.title: Helabet Expands Online Gaming Offerings with Casino Games
item.description: Helabet has launched a comprehensive online casino platform, expanding its services to include a wide range of casino games for investors and gaming enthusiasts in East Africa. This move marks a signi...

item.title: The Shift from 'the United States' to 'America' and the Expansion of U.S. Colonialism
item.description: The article explores the historical transformation of the United States' national identity, shifting from 'the United States' to 'America' in 1898 due to rapid colonial expansion. This change coincide...

item.title: Sinner and Zverev Advance to Wimbledon Final
item.description: The article reports that Italian tennis player Jannik Sinner and German player Alexander Zverev have advanced to the Wimbledon final. This achievement highlights their strong performance in the tourna...

item.title: Access Holdings Boosts Employee Ownership with N5.5bn Equity Stake
item.description: Access Holdings Plc has officially vested over 220 million ordinary shares valued at approximately N5.5 billion to 77 key employees across the group. This significant share-vesting exercise highlights...

item.title: B.C. Wildfire Complex Near Boston Bar Faces Increased Fire Risk Amid Changing Weather Conditions
item.description: The Brunswick wildfire complex near Boston Bar, B.C., continues to rage out of control, with firefighters warning of 'vigorous fire behaviour' expected as weather conditions shift. The complex, compri...

item.title: Police Raid in Mohlakeng Leads to Over 70 Arrests and Seizures of Illegal Mining Equipment
item.description: During a coordinated operation in Mohlakeng, police and soldiers arrested over 70 individuals, including seven women, at Bundu Inn following a raid on Friday, 10 July 2026. The operation, part of Oper...

item.title: UK politician Ann Widdecombe dies after suspected murder investigation
item.description: Ann Widdecombe, a former UK minister and Member of Parliament, was found dead in her rural Devon home following a suspected murder investigation. Police have arrested a 26-year-old man in Newton Abbot...

item.title: David Beckham hosts England squad at Inter Miami ahead of World Cup clash with Norway
item.description: England's World Cup squad, including captain Harry Kane, visited David Beckham's Inter Miami training facility in Miami ahead of their quarter-final clash against Norway. The session, held at the MLS ...

item.title: Indian Diplomat Corrects Misrepresentation of Jammu and Kashmir's Status at Bangladesh Event
item.description: An Indian diplomat raised concerns during a foreign policy seminar in Dhaka over a map depicting Jammu and Kashmir as part of Pakistan. Second Secretary Puja Jha interrupted a presentation by former B...

item.title: Three Missing Children Found Dead in Abandoned Car in Tanzania's Coast Region
item.description: Three children who went missing in Lamboni Village, Lugoba Ward, Chalinze District, Coast Region, were discovered dead inside an abandoned silver Toyota Carina parked outside a residential property. T...

item.title: Honey as a Natural Energy Source for Exercise Routines
item.description: The article explores how honey can serve as an effective natural energy source for athletes and fitness enthusiasts. It explains that honey, composed of glucose and fructose, provides rapid energy dur...

item.title: China Successfully Recovers First Stage of CZ-10B Rocket in Historic Space Achievement
item.description: On July 10, 2026, China marked a significant milestone in its space program with the successful launch and recovery of the CZ-10B rocket's first stage. Developed by the China Aerospace Science and Tec...

item.title: Family's Attorney Questions Official Explanation of Nolan Wells' Death
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing controversy surrounding the death of Nolan Wells, with his family's attorney, Ben Crump, publicly criticizing the official explanation provided by authorities. Crump,...

item.title: Strategies for Poilievre to Challenge Carney's Leadership in Canada
item.description: The article discusses the political challenges facing Canadian Conservative leader Pierre Poilievre as he seeks to counter Prime Minister Justin Trudeau’s Liberal government. It highlights key strateg...

item.title: Chadema Disciplines Leaders Who Accused Party Chairman
item.description: Chadema, Tanzania's main opposition party, has initiated disciplinary measures against several leaders who publicly accused chairman Freeman Mbowe (Heche) of misconduct. The action aims to restore uni...

item.title: BOC Seizes P14.2 Million Shabu Hidden in Rope Shipment
item.description: The Bureau of Customs (BOC) at Ninoy Aquino International Airport intercepted a parcel from Cambodia containing 2,102 grams of suspected shabu valued at P14.29 million. The shipment, declared as plast...

item.title: Government Allows Private Vaccination Against Foot and Mouth Disease for South African Farmers
item.description: The South African government has reached a settlement with farming sector representatives, allowing farmers to privately vaccinate their livestock against Foot and Mouth Disease (FMD). Minister of Agr...

item.title: VP JD Vance leases Virginia farm for family residence near Washington
item.description: U.S. Vice President JD Vance is leasing a portion of the Wolver Hill Farm, a sprawling property spanning nearly 500 acres in Middleburg, Virginia, to serve as an additional residence for his family. T...
